variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 160177 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 160177 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 160177 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P959783 Air Filter, Primary Obround Powercore | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 160177
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P959783 Air Filter, Primary Obround Powercore is designed to provide reliable performance in air filter, primary obround powercore applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.
